scope: fresh-seed read-only G0 after M1l Stage 0 rejection; no optimizer, parameter mutation, checkpoint selection, formal validation, test access, or reuse of seed527151
scientific_question: given that fixed anchors recover segment identity but not exact recall, is the remaining K=8 failure caused primarily by soft value mixing, fixed-key ranking, archival value precision, or the downstream context-to-address-to-retrieval path
parent_result_boundary: M1l fixed anchors passed identity, causal gain, shuffled, and capacity gates but failed K8 absolute recall 0.640625 and confidence AUROC 0.678343; seed527151 is sealed
source_conversion: parameter-free M1f with covariance-corrected content HPC ridge 0.001

retrieval_frozen_from_m1l.event_detector: rising edge of the causal balanced-action structural proposal
retrieval_frozen_from_m1l.query_anchor: fixed normalized cyclic signature at the latest detected event
retrieval_frozen_from_m1l.candidate_events: all event anchors strictly earlier than the latest/current event
retrieval_frozen_from_m1l.value: frozen M1f base_context at each candidate event
retrieval_frozen_from_m1l.attention: softmax cosine attention over candidate events

query_only_conditions.soft_candidate: the exact frozen M1l attention-weighted archival context
query_only_conditions.hard_top1_event: the single causal candidate event with maximum fixed-key cosine; deterministic earliest-index tie break
query_only_conditions.oracle_best_archival_value: diagnostic-only upper bound selecting the causal candidate value with maximum cosine to the exact correct reference context

allowed_for_source_soft_and_hard: earlier frozen base-context activations from the same episode
forbidden_model_inputs: return, conflict, correctness, or oracle mask
causal_input_contract.oracle_boundary: oracle_best_archival_value and exact reference conditions may use metadata only after the frozen soft/hard candidates are emitted, only at scored query tokens, and only for diagnosis

chain_audit.pair_rule: at context, address, and retrieval, candidate is correct when cosine to the exact-correct intervention output exceeds cosine to the exact-wrong intervention output by more than 1e-6

query_only_isolation: at most one scored query per episode is changed in any rollout; all prior reads and writes remain source M1f
frozen_classification_rule: after implementation gates, classify DOWNSTREAM when exact-correct is below its floor or exact-wrong exceeds its ceiling; else SOFT_MIXING when hard reaches its absolute, gain, pair-drop, and seed-direction gates; else KEY_RANKING when oracle-best reaches its absolute, gain, and seed-direction gates; else ARCHIVAL_VALUE_PRECISION when oracle-best remains below 0.70 and exact-correct exceeds it by at least 0.20; otherwise MIXED
post_result_rule: run all three seeds once and classify once; do not tune event definition, temperature, hard tie break, value definition, thresholds, or category order on seeds627151/637151/647151; G0 never unlocks formal access or model training by itself
